  1. Home
  2. Custom Signs
  3. Yard Signs

Yard Signs

Custom Lawn Signs 

 

  • Product Overview
  • Material Options
  • Artwork Specs
  • Production Times
  • Payment Options
  • Shipping Guidelines

Share Your Message With A Custom Yard Sign

** All signs greater than 32" x 48" in any direction are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.**

** If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300. **

** Please note: When ordering yard signs with different designs, text, imagery, etc., these signs will be priced and processed as 1 sign per design. **

Custom yard signs are a versatile promotional tool most commonly displayed in front lawns for business advertising, political promotion, real estate showings, and yard sales. Lawn signs are perfect for so many different events because they’re lightweight, easy to install, and inexpensive when compared to other signage options. They’re also incredibly effective at sharing a quick message with passing cars and pedestrians.

Here at Banners.com, we want to make designing, ordering, and displaying your yard sign easy. That’s why we offer free online templates, an intuitive online designer and real-time tracking for your order. You can also add wire installation stakes to your order to accommodate your single or double-sided yard sign.

Get started on your order for professionally designed and manufactured yard signs today.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300 and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Full Color Custom Yard Signs

These signs are digitally printed in full color on a 4 mm white corrugated plastic material. This material has hollow flutes in it similar to cardboard, which run horizontally on a 4’ x 8’ sheet (the 96 in direction.)

The 4 mm corrugated plastic material is durable, lightweight, waterproof, and can be printed single sided or double sided, making this product a great option for outdoor advertising.

*Please note, all coroplast yard signs will be cut 1/8th of an inch on each side to allow for finishing. (ex. a 18" x 24" yard sign will actually ship out to you as a 17.75" x 23.75" yard sign.) If your yard sign needs to be precise, please reach out to one of our customer service reps to discuss your specific application.*

Finishing Options

The following finishing options are available:

• 1/2" in white margin or a full bleed (the ink goes all the way to the edge of the sign)

• Single or double sided signs

• Yard sign accessories: H Stake 10x15, 10x24 or 10x30. Beefy Stakes. Zip Ties 12 inches - Black and Zip Ties 36 inches - White. 

Scoring

All signs over 32" x 48" or any sign where the H + W is 81 inches or greater are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines. 

If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300.

Artwork Guidelines

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

All yard signs must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Shipping Maps

Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial to the customer's experience based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric Banners

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods:

Standard ( 3–5 Business Days )
Three Day ( 3 Business Days )
Two Day ( 2 Business Days )
Overnight ( 1 Business Day )
UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping, please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

Yard signs are a simple yet surprisingly powerful tool to put your message front and center throughout everyday spaces. Whether you're eager to sell your home, promoting a flash sale for your business, running a local mayoral campaign, or celebrating a can't-miss event like birthdays and graduations, our yard signs give you the big impact without the cost. These signs are super lightweight, all while being easy to set up, and with full CMYK color printing, they'll be catching the eyes of drivers, neighbors, and locals alike. From spotlighting seasonal deals to cheering on your favorite sports team, custom yard signs offer a creative yet unique way to share your message with the world.

      Add to Cart

       

       

       

       

       

      More About Custom Printed Yard Signs Return to Top

      Design custom yard signs to further boost your brand's visibility or merely highlight your next garage sale. These lawn signs are durable yet lightweight, making them an excellent choice regardless of the job. People use custom yard signs for a multitude of use cases, such as business yard signs, political yard signs, graduation yard signs, happy birthday yard signs, and more. At Banners.com, we digitally print all of our custom lawn signs on our weatherproof 4 mm corrugated plastic, making these signs an excellent choice for all of your outdoor signage needs.

      It isn’t hard to make a custom yard sign with Banners.com! When you order, you can choose the size, sides, and viewing distance for your custom yard sign. You have the option to make your yard sign 12” x 12” all the way up to 48” x 96”.

      Sturdy, weather-resistant yet lightweight, our high-quality lawn signs are a must-have marketing tool. These handy 4 mm corrugated plastic signs have seemingly endless uses!

      You can design your custom yard signs right on our website using our online design tool. You can use your own artwork or try one of our many templates. Get in touch with customer service for design help.

      Get started on your custom yard sign order today! Don't forget to check out our best-selling custom banners, as well!

      Three Easy Ways to Order Custom Yard Signs

      Online Designer Create your own design using our online banner, sign and flag designer. Customize your yard sign with background, clipart images, text or upload your own graphics.
      Upload a File Upload your own artwork (.eps, .pdf, .jpg). For more information, check out the Product Info tab above.
      Professional Designer Our team of professional graphic designers are able to create a custom design for you. Upload any artwork you want on your lawn sign and provide instructions for us.

      Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

      What are yard signs?

      Yard signs are lightweight signs for outdoor display, typically mounted on a wire stake for lawns, sidewalks, and curbside visibility. They’re popular for real estate, businesses, events, and directional messaging.

      What material are your yard signs printed on?

      Our yard signs are printed on 4mm corrugated plastic (coroplast) with hollow flutes for strength and lightweight durability.

      What are the most common yard sign sizes?

      The most common sizes are 12" × 18" and 18" × 24", with additional options from 12" × 12" up to 48" × 96".

      Can my yard signs be printed double-sided?

      Yes—yard signs can be printed double-sided so your message is readable from both directions.

      Do you offer bulk pricing for yard signs?

      Yes—bulk discounts are available, and the per-sign price decreases as quantity increases.

      What production times do you offer, and when does turnaround start?

      Choose 1–5 business day production (1-Day Priority, 2-Day Express, 3-Day Standard, or 5-Day Saver). Turnaround starts after file upload is complete (or after approval if a proof or prepress hold is required). Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the next business day.

      Do yard signs come with stakes, and can I order extras?

      Wire stakes are available in multiple sizes, and you can order extra stakes and accessories as needed.

      Can I display a yard sign without stakes?

      Yes—select corner grommets if you want to hang or mount your sign instead of using stakes.

      Are yard signs weather-resistant, and how should I store them?

      Yes—corrugated plastic yard signs are weather-resistant for outdoor use, but strong wind can move lightweight signs if they aren’t secured. Store signs flat in a dry, temperature-stable place and avoid bending or folding to prevent flute damage.

       

      Why Choose Banners.com?

      Customer Service

      Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

      Fast Turnaround

      Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

       

      Quality Products

      Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

      Live Order Tracking

      Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.

metaDescription: Get noticed with custom yard signs and personalized lawn signs. Weatherproof, long-lasting, and perfect for outdoor advertising. Create yours online now!

Full Color Custom Yard Signs These signs are digitally printed in full color on a 4 mm white corrugated plastic material. This material has hollow flutes in it similar to cardboard, which run horizontally on a 4’ x 8’ sheet (the 96 in direction.) The 4 mm corrugated plastic material is durable, lightweight, waterproof, and can be printed single sided or double sided, making this product a great option for outdoor advertising. *Please note, all coroplast yard signs will be cut 1/8th of an inch on each side to allow for finishing. (ex. a 18" x 24" yard sign will actually ship out to you as a 17.75" x 23.75" yard sign.) If your yard sign needs to be precise, please reach out to one of our customer service reps to discuss your specific application.* Finishing Options The following finishing options are available: • 1/2" in white margin or a full bleed (the ink goes all the way to the edge of the sign) • Single or double sided signs • Yard sign accessories: H Stake 10x15, 10x24 or 10x30.
